mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in industrial production signals improving real activity and operating leverage for listed firms, causing higher expected earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth does not produce higher subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns than lower INDPRO growth in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening household credit demand, construction activity, and durable-goods spillovers, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward observations, or if average triggered returns are not below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI is accelerating while the federal funds rate is also rising, markets price tighter policy and higher discount rates, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth rises and FEDFUNDS increases more than 25bp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPI acceleration and FEDFUNDS increase state is not associated with lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than periods without the joint state, or if the interaction coefficient is not negative in walk-forward estimation.

mechanism_narrative: A falling unemployment rate paired with rising payroll employment signals broad labor-income growth and lower recession risk, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls at least 0.2pp over 3 months and PAYEMS rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor-strength observations do not outperform unconditional 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the joint signal has a nonpositive average return in at least two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales indicate resilient household consumption and stronger near-term revenue growth for consumer-exposed firms, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with RSAFS 3-month growth above 1% fail to produce higher subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns than periods below the threshold, or if hit rate is below 50% after transaction-free walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals easier financial conditions and lower discount rates, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as equity valuations reprice quickly.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls at least 25bp over 1 month
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day S&P 500 returns following FEDFUNDS declines of at least 25bp are not above unconditional 5-day returns, or if the triggered signal has negative mean return in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI combined with declining industrial production identifies a stagflationary shock that compresses margins and raises discount rates, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month growth accelerates while INDPRO falls over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI acceleration and INDPRO decline interaction is not followed by lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than unconditional returns, or if the estimated interaction effect is positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: An upside break in housing starts signals improving credit-sensitive demand and future construction-linked spending, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days through cyclical risk appetite.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises above its 6-month moving average after being below it in the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upside-break triggers do not produce positive average 5-day S&P 500 returns, or if triggered returns are below unconditional 5-day returns in more than half of rolling 2-year windows.
